Description: Load page fragments without full page reload
Do: hx-get on links and buttons for partial content
Don't: Full page navigations for small updates

Description: Submit forms via AJAX and swap the response
Do: hx-post on forms to submit without redirect
Don't: Traditional form post when partial update suffices

Description: Control how response content replaces the target
Do: innerHTML for updating contents outerHTML for replacing element
Don't: Default innerHTML when you need to replace the whole element

Description: Prevent excessive requests during typing
Do: hx-trigger="keyup changed delay:300ms" on search inputs
Don't: No delay on keyup triggers

Description: Provide visual feedback during HTMX requests
Do: hx-indicator pointing to a spinner element
Don't: No loading feedback on slow requests

Description: Automatically convert links and forms to AJAX
Do: hx-boost="true" on body or nav for seamless transitions
Don't: hx-boost on elements that need full page loads

Guideline: Use Out-of-Band swaps for multiple updates
Description: Update multiple page regions from one response
Do: hx-swap-oob="true" on extra elements in response
Don't: Multiple sequential HTMX requests for related updates

Description: Prompt user before delete or irreversible operations
Do: hx-confirm on delete buttons
Don't: No confirmation on destructive actions

Description: Update URL when HTMX loads meaningful content
Do: hx-push-url="true" on navigational content loads
Don't: Push URL for every minor swap

Guideline: Use hx-select to pick response fragments
Description: Extract specific elements from a full page response
Do: hx-select to grab a fragment from a full response
Don't: Return full pages and rely on client to parse

Description: ASP.NET Core requires anti-forgery tokens for POST requests
Do: Add RequestVerificationToken header via hx-headers or meta tag
Don't: Skip anti-forgery for HTMX posts

Description: Tag Helpers generate correct action URLs and anti-forgery tokens
Do: <form asp-page="/Contact" method="post">
Don't: Manual form action URLs

Guideline: Bind form inputs to PageModel properties
Description: Model binding maps form fields to [BindProperty] properties
Do: BindProperty attribute on PageModel properties
Don't: Manual Request.Form access

Description: Prevent duplicate form submissions on refresh
Do: Redirect after successful POST
Don't: Returning a page directly from OnPost

Description: Validate individual fields as user types
Do: hx-get to a validation handler on blur
Don't: Only validate on full form submit
Code Bad: Validate all fields only on submit

Description: Use jQuery Validation Unobtrusive for immediate feedback
Do: Include jquery.validate.unobtrusive.js
Don't: Server-only validation with full round trips

Description: Use validation Tag Helpers with consistent CSS classes
Do: asp-validation-for with styled spans
Don't: Unstyled or missing validation messages

Description: Shared layout provides header footer and common assets
Do: _Layout.cshtml for site-wide chrome
Don't: Duplicating header/footer in every page

Description: Shared UI fragments reduce duplication
Do: Partial views for repeated card or list item markup
Don't: Duplicating markup across pages
Code Bad: Copy-paste card HTML in each page

Description: ViewComponents encapsulate logic and rendering
Do: ViewComponent for fragments needing data access or logic
Don't: Partial views with complex logic in the page

Description: Return just the partial HTML for HTMX without layout
Do: return Partial("_ItemList" items) for HTMX handlers
Don't: Return full Page() for HTMX requests

Description: Centralize @using @addTagHelper directives
Do: _ViewImports.cshtml for shared namespaces and Tag Helpers
Don't: Repeating @using in every page

Description: Set the default layout in _ViewStart.cshtml
Do: _ViewStart.cshtml with Layout assignment
Don't: Setting Layout in every page

Guideline: Use Display Templates for consistent formatting
Description: Display templates standardize how types are rendered
Do: DisplayTemplates for dates currencies addresses
Don't: Inline formatting logic in every page

Guideline: Use anchor Tag Helper for page links
Description: asp-page generates correct URLs automatically
Do: asp-page and asp-route-* for links
Don't: Hardcoded href paths

Description: Append file version hash to prevent stale cached assets
Do: asp-append-version="true" on images and scripts
Don't: Static file references without versioning

Description: Conditionally include assets based on environment
Do: <environment include="Development"> for dev-only scripts
Don't: Same asset bundles in development and production
Code Bad: Same CSS bundle in dev and prod

Guideline: Use label and input Tag Helpers
Description: Tag Helpers generate accessible labels and correct input types
Do: asp-for on label and input elements
Don't: Manual for/id matching and input types

Guideline: Create custom Tag Helpers for repeated patterns
Description: Encapsulate repeated HTML patterns in custom Tag Helpers
Do: Custom Tag Helper for alert boxes or card components
Don't: Copy-paste complex HTML patterns

Guideline: Use CSS classes not inline styles
Description: Maintain separation of concerns with external classes
Do: CSS classes for all styling
Don't: Inline style attributes

Description: Ensure layouts adapt across screen sizes
Do: Responsive classes or media queries for breakpoints
Don't: Fixed-width layouts

Guideline: Use CSS custom properties for theming
Description: CSS variables enable consistent theming and easy updates
Do: CSS custom properties for colors spacing typography
Don't: Hardcoded values repeated throughout

Guideline: Bundle and minify CSS and JS
Description: Reduce payload size in production
Do: Use bundling and minification in production
Don't: Serving unminified assets in production

Guideline: Use BEM or scoped naming conventions
Description: Prevent CSS class name collisions
Do: BEM naming or CSS modules for scoped styles
Don't: Generic class names that collide

Description: Load data in OnGet and populate the model
Do: OnGet/OnGetAsync for data retrieval and page setup
Don't: Data fetching in the Razor view
Code Good: public async Task OnGetAsync() { Items = await _db.GetItems(); }

Guideline: Use named handlers for multiple actions
Description: Named handlers allow multiple POST actions per page
Do: asp-page-handler for distinct form actions
Don't: Single OnPost handling multiple unrelated actions
Code Bad: if/else in OnPost to dispatch actions

Description: Different results for different scenarios
Do: RedirectToPage for PRG and Partial for HTMX
Don't: Always returning Page()

Description: TempData persists data across a redirect for one request
Do: TempData["Success"] for post-redirect-get messages
Don't: ViewData that disappears on redirect

Description: Razor Pages uses file-based routing by convention
Do: Organize pages by feature in the Pages folder
Don't: Custom route overrides for every page

Description: Tag Helper generates correct URLs from page paths
Do: Products
Don't: Hardcoded URL strings

Description: Indicate the current page in navigation
Do: Compare ViewContext.RouteData to set active class
Don't: No active state on current nav item

Description: Areas group related pages into separate sections
Do: Areas for admin dashboard or API sections
Don't: Flat Pages folder with 100+ pages

Description: Forms must submit and function without HTMX or JS
Do: Standard form post as baseline behavior
Don't: HTMX-only forms that break without JS

Description: Add hx-boost on top of working server-rendered pages
Do: hx-boost upgrades standard navigation to AJAX
Don't: Build HTMX-first without server-rendered fallback

Description: Show alternative content when JavaScript is disabled
Do: <noscript> blocks for critical JS-dependent features
Don't: Blank page or broken UI without JS
Code Bad: No noscript and broken search without JS

Description: Show friendly error pages for 404 and 500 errors
Do: UseStatusCodePagesWithReExecute for error pages
Don't: Default developer exception page in production

Description: Show validation errors near the relevant form fields
Do: asp-validation-summary and asp-validation-for
Don't: Silent validation failures with no user feedback
Code Bad: No error display after failed validation

Guideline: Use Response Caching for static content
Description: Cache full page responses for content that rarely changes
Do: ResponseCache attribute on read-only pages
Don't: [ResponseCache(Duration = 60)] for stable content
Code Bad: No caching on stable read-only pages

Guideline: Use Output Caching for HTMX partials
Description: Cache rendered partial responses to reduce server load
Do: OutputCache on handlers returning partials for lists
Don't: Regenerate the same partial on every request
Code Bad: No caching on frequently requested partials

Guideline: Add preconnect hints for external resources
Description: Reduce DNS/TLS latency for third-party assets
Do: <link rel="preconnect"> for CDN and font origins
Don't: No preconnect hints for external origins

Description: HTMX attributes work on any element but use semantic ones
Do: hx-get on <a> and hx-post on <form> or <button>
Don't: hx-get on <div> or <span> for clickable regions

Guideline: Add aria-live for HTMX swap regions
Description: Announce dynamic content changes to screen readers
Do: aria-live="polite" on HTMX target containers
Don't: HTMX swaps with no ARIA announcement

Description: Move focus to new content so keyboard users are not lost
Do: htmx:afterSwap event to focus new content
Don't: No focus management after content swap
Code Bad: Content swaps leave focus on old element

Guideline: Send CSRF token with HTMX requests
Description: ASP.NET Core rejects POST requests without anti-forgery tokens
Do: Configure HTMX to send RequestVerificationToken header
Don't: Skip CSRF for HTMX thinking it is an API

Description: CSP prevents XSS by restricting script and style sources
Do: Strict CSP header allowing only trusted origins
Don't: No CSP header in production
